title: OpenCorde — Self-hosted Discord alternative with E2EE
textSnippet:
OpenCorde
BETA
GitHub
Sign in
Get started
AGPL-3.0 · Self-hosted · E2EE Live · Desktop App
Team communication
on your terms

OpenCorde is a feature-complete OpenCorde platform you run yourself. Spaces, channels, voice, video, threads, forums, E2EE, and a Discord bridge — all on infrastructure you own.

Create an account
View on GitHub
Sign in →
Everything your team needs
🔐
End-to-End Encryption

MLS protocol (RFC 9420) for text channels, voice, video, and file transfers. Keys never leave your d

Team communication
on your terms

OpenCorde is a feature-complete OpenCorde platform you run yourself. Spaces, channels, voice, video, threads, forums, E2EE, and a Discord bridge — all on infrastructure you own.
